analysis.construction_strategy: Extrude a 110x55 rectangle to an unspecified height. Shell the top face with a 6mm thickness. Add a central rib at the 55mm mark along the length to create two internal pockets.

features.name: Open Top Cavity
features.profile: Rectangle with 6mm offset from outer boundary

analysis.overall_shape: A rectangular box-like shell with an open top, uniform wall thickness, and a single internal divider splitting the volume into two equal compartments.
analysis.title: SHELLS - VARIANT 5

uncertainties.description: The vertical height (Z-axis) of the shell is not specified in the drawing.
The thickness of the central divider is not explicitly dimensioned, though it appears similar to the wall thickness.
The thickness of the floor/base is not specified; it is unclear if the shell is a through-hole or has a bottom.
The text 'OPEN TOP WALL T6' overlaps the geometry, making the exact T6 reference point slightly inferred as the wall thickness.

views.description: Top-down view showing the rectangular shell with a central divider
